sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72842" key="o)kta/tomos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀκτά-τομος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n72842.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">divided into eight tomes,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βίβλος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:7:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.9</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
